title: Intense Nutty Italian Almonds Tagliatelle
description: A keto-friendly Italian dish featuring nutty flavors and a delicate tagliatelle form, perfect for a date night dinner. The combination of rice vinegar and almonds creates a unique taste experience.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the tagliatelle for 2-3 minutes or until it floats to the surface.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the sliced almonds until they are lightly toasted.
In a large bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar, parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked tagliatelle to the bowl and toss with the vinegar and cheese mixture until the pasta is well coated.
Add the toasted almonds to the bowl and toss again to combine.
Serve the tagliatelle hot, garnished with additional parmesan cheese and almonds if desired.
To make the tagliatelle, combine the almond flour and eggs in a bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it is smooth and pliable.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/16 inch and cut into tagliatelle shape.
Dry the tagliatelle for 30 minutes before cooking to remove excess moisture.
